subcodes.first_line: What thou hast written hath been noted, and that which thou hast mentioned hath likewise been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ شد و آنچه ذکر نموده بودید ایضا مسموع گردید این
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @The Holy Spirit, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
